hero_tekst: We are not an anonymous production supplier — we are a technical partner who thinks along, grows with you and always seeks the best solution for your specific challenge.
verhaal_titel: From Garage Company to Industrial Partner
verhaal_tekst: Plastic Industrie Utrecht BV was founded out of a passion for precision and the belief that smaller companies deserve the same quality as large corporations.

tijdlijn.tekst: Started with two injection moulding machines and a focus on small, precise series for the mechanical engineering industry.
In-house tooling department established — shorter lead times and better quality control of tools.
Investment in SLS technology accelerates the prototyping phase for clients and significantly reduces time-to-market.
From medical devices to automotive — we deliver technical plastic solutions for every sector.

missie_quote: We believe that the quality of a plastic component should never depend on the order quantity. Whether you order 10 or 10,000 pieces — our standard is always the same: perfect.

punten.tekst: No external tooling company — we design and produce our own moulds. Faster adjustments and lower costs.
Minimum 1 piece possible. We specialise in small and medium series where others say no.
From quote to first production part in record time. Streamlined processes eliminate unnecessary waiting time.
Our engineering team proactively analyses your design for improvements in manufacturability and cost savings.
